summary: Soundboard recording with modest static issues captures a high‑energy spring ’71 show highlighted by a smoking China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider and a ferocious The Other One.
review: The performance is widely praised – tight jams, a standout China/IKYR transition, an incendiary Other One and solid Hard To Handle.  While the soundboard source suffers from occasional right‑channel static and mild distortion, most listeners feel the mix is decent enough to enjoy the historic playing.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers give 4–5 stars and highlight exceptional musical moments; recording flaws are noted but not enough to outweigh the strong performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Occasional right‑channel static, mild distortion and level quirks are mentioned, but overall mix is balanced and the tape captures the band’s dynamics well.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Listeners rave about the seamless second‑set flow, especially the China > Rider transition and extended jams.  The first set is solid though less frequently singled out.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s guitar work receives high praise – soaring wah‑wah tones on The Other One and overall strong playing.
band_member_comments.Drums: Bill Kreutzmann’s drum solo is highlighted as a powerful lead‑in to the extended jams.
